description.zh: AI 应用、云平台、企业软件、数据中心服务器与算力基础设施板块。
description.en: AI apps, cloud platforms, enterprise software, data-center servers and compute infrastructure.

description.zh: GPU、存储、晶圆代工、EDA、设备、封装与先进制程板块。
description.en: GPUs, memory, foundries, EDA, equipment, packaging and advanced process nodes.

description.zh: 消费互联网、广告、电商、流媒体、应用生态与大型科技平台板块。
description.en: Consumer internet, ads, e-commerce, streaming, app ecosystems and mega-cap platforms.

description.zh: 电动车整车、Robotaxi、电池、自动驾驶、补能网络与智能座舱板块。
description.en: EV makers, robotaxi, batteries, autonomy, charging networks and smart cockpits.

description.zh: 油气、光伏、储能、电网、公用事业、核能与电力基础设施板块。
description.en: Oil & gas, solar, storage, grid, utilities, nuclear and power infrastructure.

description.zh: 比特币、稳定币、交易所、矿企、支付、数字券商与零售交易板块。
description.en: Bitcoin, stablecoins, exchanges, miners, payments, brokers and retail trading rails.

description.zh: 大型银行、投行、保险、信用卡网络、资产管理与综合金融板块。
description.en: Large banks, investment banks, insurers, card networks, asset managers and diversified financials.

description.zh: 制药、生物科技、医疗服务、器械、减重药与临床管线板块。
description.en: Pharma, biotech, healthcare services, devices, obesity drugs and clinical pipelines.

description.zh: 商业航天、卫星、航空、国防军工、工业自动化与先进制造板块。
description.en: Commercial space, satellites, aerospace, defense, industrial automation and advanced manufacturing.

description.zh: 散户交易活跃、Meme 股、逼空候选与高波动小盘成长板块。
description.en: Retail-heavy, meme-stock, squeeze-candidate and high-volatility small-cap growth names.
